entry.title: New: RES26-134 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
APPROVING THE EXPENDITURE OF CLEAN WATER AND NATURAL LANDS FUNDS TO ACQUIRE A PERPETUAL CONSERVATION EASEMENT OVER TWELVE PARCELS KNOWN AS KE KĪPUKA O KALAEUILA TAX MAP KEYS: (1) 5-6-003: 011, 019, 020, 021, 022, 023, 024, 026, 030, 031, 046 AND 049 IN KAHUKU, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: This Resolution is a reintroduction of Resolution 25-176 which will be filed on June 19, 2026, pursuant to ROH Section 1-2.5 which sets a one year filing period on pending resolutions. Introduced.

View on the council site
